options.content: **One-stop incident view** · top-of-fold is the health summary · expand collapsed rows below to drill into Traefik, Nginx, APIs, datastores, JVM/Node, infrastructure, k8s, DNS.

targets.expr: sum((sum by (svc) (label_replace(kube_deployment_status_replicas_ready{namespace="roboshop", deployment=~"roboshop-(user|cart|catalogue|payment|ratings|orders|shipping|frontend)"}, "svc", "$1", "deployment", "roboshop-(.*)"))) - (sum by (svc) (label_replace(count by (endpointslice) (kube_endpointslice_endpoints{namespace="roboshop", ready="true", endpointslice=~"roboshop-(user|cart|catalogue|payment|ratings|orders|shipping|frontend)-[a-z0-9]+"}), "svc", "$1", "endpointslice", "roboshop-([^-]+)-[a-z0-9]+"))) > 0) or vector(0)

sum by (job) (
  rate(http_requests_total{job="roboshop-user", route!="/metrics", namespace="roboshop"}[$__rate_interval])
  or rate(http_requests_total{job="roboshop-cart", route!="/metrics", namespace="roboshop"}[$__rate_interval])
  or rate(http_requests_total{job="roboshop-catalogue", path!="/metrics", namespace="roboshop"}[$__rate_interval])
  or rate(http_requests_total{job="roboshop-payment", handler!="/metrics", namespace="roboshop"}[$__rate_interval])
  or rate(http_server_requests_seconds_count{job=~"roboshop-orders|roboshop-shipping", uri!~"/actuator.*", namespace="roboshop"}[$__rate_interval])
  or rate(flask_http_request_total{job="roboshop-ratings", namespace="roboshop"}[$__rate_interval])
)

sum by (job) (rate(http_server_requests_seconds_sum{job=~"roboshop-orders|roboshop-shipping", uri!~"/actuator.*", namespace="roboshop"}[$__rate_interval])) / sum by (job) (rate(http_server_requests_seconds_count{job=~"roboshop-orders|roboshop-shipping", uri!~"/actuator.*", namespace="roboshop"}[$__rate_interval]))

sum by (job) (
  increase(http_requests_total{job=~"roboshop-user|roboshop-cart", status_code=~"5..", namespace="roboshop"}[$__rate_interval])
  or increase(http_requests_total{job="roboshop-catalogue", status=~"5..", namespace="roboshop"}[$__rate_interval])
  or increase(http_requests_total{job="roboshop-payment", status="5xx", namespace="roboshop"}[$__rate_interval])
  or increase(http_server_requests_seconds_count{job=~"roboshop-orders|roboshop-shipping", status=~"5..", namespace="roboshop"}[$__rate_interval])
  or increase(flask_http_request_total{job="roboshop-ratings", status=~"5..", namespace="roboshop"}[$__rate_interval])
)

sum by (job) (label_replace(sum by (job) (
  rate(http_requests_total{job="roboshop-user", route!="/metrics", namespace="roboshop"}[$__rate_interval])
  or rate(http_requests_total{job="roboshop-cart", route!="/metrics", namespace="roboshop"}[$__rate_interval])
  or rate(http_requests_total{job="roboshop-catalogue", path!="/metrics", namespace="roboshop"}[$__rate_interval])
  or rate(http_requests_total{job="roboshop-payment", handler!="/metrics", namespace="roboshop"}[$__rate_interval])
  or rate(http_server_requests_seconds_count{job=~"roboshop-orders|roboshop-shipping", uri!~"/actuator.*", namespace="roboshop"}[$__rate_interval])
  or rate(flask_http_request_total{job="roboshop-ratings", namespace="roboshop"}[$__rate_interval])
),"job","$1","job","(.*)"))

sum by (job) (label_replace(sum by (job) (
  rate(http_requests_total{job=~"roboshop-user|roboshop-cart", status_code=~"5..", namespace="roboshop"}[$__rate_interval])
  or rate(http_requests_total{job="roboshop-catalogue", status=~"5..", namespace="roboshop"}[$__rate_interval])
  or rate(http_requests_total{job="roboshop-payment", status="5xx", namespace="roboshop"}[$__rate_interval])
  or rate(http_server_requests_seconds_count{job=~"roboshop-orders|roboshop-shipping", status=~"5..", namespace="roboshop"}[$__rate_interval])
  or rate(flask_http_request_total{job="roboshop-ratings", status=~"5..", namespace="roboshop"}[$__rate_interval])
),"job","$1","job","(.*)"))

sum by (job) (  increase(http_requests_total{job=~"roboshop-user|roboshop-cart", status_code=~"5..", namespace="roboshop"}[1h])  or increase(http_requests_total{job="roboshop-catalogue", status=~"5..", namespace="roboshop"}[1h])  or increase(http_requests_total{job="roboshop-payment", status="5xx", namespace="roboshop"}[1h])  or increase(http_server_requests_seconds_count{job=~"roboshop-orders|roboshop-shipping", status=~"5..", namespace="roboshop"}[1h])  or increase(flask_http_request_total{job="roboshop-ratings", status=~"5..", namespace="roboshop"}[1h]))

(histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le, job) (rate(http_request_duration_seconds_bucket{job=~"roboshop-user|roboshop-cart|roboshop-catalogue|roboshop-payment", route!="/metrics", namespace="roboshop"}[$__rate_interval]))) or histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le, job) (rate(flask_http_request_duration_seconds_bucket{job="roboshop-ratings", namespace="roboshop"}[$__rate_interval]))) or (sum by (job) (rate(http_server_requests_seconds_sum{job=~"roboshop-orders|roboshop-shipping", uri!~"/actuator.*", namespace="roboshop"}[$__rate_interval])) / sum by (job) (rate(http_server_requests_seconds_count{job=~"roboshop-orders|roboshop-shipping", uri!~"/actuator.*", namespace="roboshop"}[$__rate_interval]))))

panels.title: Traefik · 5xx COUNT by code (per interval, bars)
Nginx · TCP accept rate (accepted vs handled)
Top routes by p95 latency (prom-client services)

targets.expr: topk(8, histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le, job, route) (rate(http_request_duration_seconds_bucket{job=~"roboshop-user|roboshop-cart|roboshop-catalogue|roboshop-payment", route!="/metrics", namespace="roboshop"}[$__rate_interval]))))

panels.title: Orders/Shipping · top routes by mean latency

targets.expr: topk(8, sum by (job, uri) (rate(http_server_requests_seconds_sum{job=~"roboshop-orders|roboshop-shipping", uri!~"/actuator.*", namespace="roboshop"}[$__rate_interval])) / sum by (job, uri) (rate(http_server_requests_seconds_count{job=~"roboshop-orders|roboshop-shipping", uri!~"/actuator.*", namespace="roboshop"}[$__rate_interval])))

panels.title: Service endpoints (Ready pods vs Service endpoints)
